name: ash
description: Run ASH (Automated Security Helper) security scans via MCP — Bandit, Semgrep, detect-secrets, Checkov, Grype, Syft, and more across Python, JS, IaC, and dependencies.
trigger_description: Run security scans with the ASH (Automated Security Helper) MCP server. Use this skill whenever the user asks to scan for vulnerabilities, run a security check, find CVEs, audit dependencies, check for secrets, run SAST or SCA, scan IaC (Terraform/CloudFormation/Kubernetes), check for hardcoded credentials, or mentions ASH, Bandit, Semgrep, Checkov, Grype, Syft, or detect-secrets. Also trigger when the user wants to find security issues, harden a codebase, or asks "is my code secure". Do NOT trigger for code review without security context, performance audits, or test writing.

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Run an ASH security scan on the current directory and report findings

commands.name: results
commands.description: Fetch and display results from the most recent ASH scan

agents.name: security-scanner
agents.description: Use this agent when the user asks for a comprehensive security audit, a "scan and analyze" workflow, or wants the agent to autonomously run ASH and triage findings without back-and-forth.
